body.title: Self-motivating coding loop: PROC_CODING_SPRINT schedulable
body.result: PROC_CODING_SPRINT now fires every 5 min via SchedulerSource (schedule_interval_sec=300, code_ref=tools.ops:run_coding_sprint). run_coding_sprint guards against double-fire with GOAL_READY TWM check. Full autonomous loop: PROC_QUEUE_DRAIN (30min) → PROC_GOAL_CONTINUATION (2min) → GOAL_READY in TWM → PROC_CODING_SPRINT (5min) → pe_chain. Igor restarts to activate. Committed edbc9382.
body.description: Two parts: (1) DB: add schedule_interval_sec=300 + code_ref=tools.ops:run_coding_sprint to PROC_CODING_SPRINT so SchedulerSource fires it every 5 min without needing a user turn. (2) ops.py: add GOAL_READY TWM check at top of run_coding_sprint — skip if no goal_ready in TWM (prevents double-fire on scheduler ticks without pending work). Together these make Igor autonomously loop on worker=igor tickets without any CC nudge.
